case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. KATHY A. GUERRA et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. SERVED SEP-28-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRA, KATHY A.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST JEROME M. YALON, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-02-2009, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-17-2009. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT GUERRA, KATHY A. HEARING SET FOR OCT-29-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT KATHY GUERRA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. KATHY A. GUERRA HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: DONNA LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR# 4280 (D206)
